seoTitle: How to Buy on Gumroad: Products, Brushes & Courses
metaDescription: Learn how to find products on Gumroad, complete secure checkout, and access your purchased ebooks, brushes, templates, or courses right away.
intro: Gumroad hosts everything from digital brushes and templates to full online courses, and buying is designed to be simple even if you've never used the platform. This guide covers finding a product, completing checkout, and getting access to your download the moment payment goes through.

steps.heading: Find a product on Gumroad
steps.body: Browse or follow a direct link to the creator's product page to review what's included before buying.

steps.heading: Add the product and checkout
steps.body: Select any available options, then move into the checkout flow to enter your details.

steps.heading: Complete payment
steps.body: Choose a supported payment method and confirm the purchase to finalize the transaction.

steps.heading: Access and download your purchase
steps.body: After payment, your files or course access become available immediately from the receipt page.

faq.question: What payment methods does Gumroad accept?
faq.answer: Gumroad typically supports major credit cards along with other digital payment options shown at checkout.

faq.question: Do I need a Gumroad account to buy something?
faq.answer: You can often check out as a guest, but creating an account makes it easier to find your past purchases later.

faq.question: Where do my downloads go after I pay?
faq.answer: You're taken to a receipt page with your files, and a copy is also emailed to you for later access.

faq.question: Is it safe to enter my payment details on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Gumroad processes checkout through a secure payment flow, so your card details aren't shared directly with the creator.
